app.subtitle: admin console
app.title: cmem-server
audit.title: Audit log
dashboard.title: Dashboard
empty.audit.hint: Privileged actions (login / admin operations) appear here once they happen.
empty.audit.title: No audit events
empty.dashboard.hint: Your server has just started — no users or observations yet. Create the first invite code to onboard users, or push observations from a Claude Code session.
empty.dashboard.title: Welcome to cmem-server
empty.export.hint: Once users register and push observations, the CSV / .db.gz / .zip exports below will return non-trivial data.
empty.export.title: Nothing to export yet
empty.invites.hint: Generate an invite code to let new users register without admin intervention.
empty.invites.title: No invite codes yet
empty.observations.hint: Observations are produced by Claude Code via the cmem-mem hook and pushed by cmem-sync. None have been received yet.
empty.observations.title: No observations yet
empty.projects.hint: Projects appear automatically once a user logs in via the cmem-sync client and pushes observations from Claude Code.
empty.projects.title: No projects yet
empty.shares.hint: Users can share their projects (read-only or read-write) with other accounts. Encourage your team to use share-project.
empty.shares.title: No project shares
empty.users.hint: Invite collaborators by generating an invite code, or create users manually.
empty.users.title: Only the admin account exists
export.audit.title: audit.csv
export.full.desc: Whole SQLite database via VACUUM INTO + gzip. Open with sqlite3.
export.full.title: full.db.gz
export.observations.title: observations.csv
export.peruser.desc: Bundle one user's profile + machines + projects + observations + shares + audit into a single .zip (each as JSON).
export.peruser.hint: Open the user detail page (/admin/users -> click a username) and use the download user .zip button.
export.peruser.title: Per-user .zip
export.title: Export
export.users.title: users.csv
invites.title: Invite codes
login.title: Sign in
login.register_link: New user? Register with an invite code
register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Register a new account (use it to sign in from the claude-mem client)
register.invite_required: This server requires an invite code to register
register.invite_optional: Open registration is enabled. Invite code is optional (admins may track its source)
register.success.title: Account created
register.success.body: Open the claude-mem client → Sync (bottom right) → sign in with this account to start syncing.
settings.title: Server settings
settings.registration.title: User registration policy
settings.registration.hint: Controls access to the public /register page and /api/auth/register. Changes take effect immediately, no restart required.
settings.registration.open.hint: Anyone can register an account. Invite code is optional (admins may track source).
settings.registration.invite_only.hint: A valid invite code is required to register. Requests without one are rejected.
settings.registration.closed.hint: Registration fully disabled. /register shows a notice, API rejects requests. Existing accounts unaffected.
register.closed.title: Registration is closed
register.closed.hint: The admin has paused new sign-ups. Please contact the admin to get an account.
observations.title: Observations
projects.col.name: name
projects.placeholder.name: project name...
projects.title: Projects
shares.create_hint: Get project_id from /admin/projects. target_type=link generates anonymous URL. target_type=public allows any logged-in user.
shares.title: Project shares
user_detail.confirm.reset_password: Reset password? old refresh tokens will be revoked.
users.hint.htmx: hint: requires HTMX json-enc extension; alternatively, POST JSON to /api/admin/users via curl.
users.title: Users
